x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: HR KB articles are the primary source for Now Assist HRSD AI Search results and case deflection suggestions. Low HR KB volume means Now Assist cannot suggest self-service answers for HR inquiries.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Create HR KB articles covering your top HR inquiry categories (benefits, payroll, policies, onboarding). Target: 50+ published active articles. Now Assist HRSD AI Search indexes all accessible KBs — focus on quality and coverage.
